isolation: microVM (each sandbox runs as an ephemeral microVM with its own filesystem, shell, package manager, and network boundary)
name: LangSmith Sandboxes
notes: LangChain manages the sandbox infrastructure, so there is no separate provider account or infrastructure to set up. Sandboxes are ephemeral by default.
summary: LangSmith Sandboxes are managed, isolated environments from LangChain that let AI agents execute generated or untrusted code without affecting surrounding infrastructure. Each sandbox runs as an ephemeral microVM with its own filesystem, shell, package manager, and network boundary. Developers create and manage sandboxes through the Python or TypeScript SDK using an existing LangSmith API key.
